name: agent-lifecycle-kit
description: Provider-neutral lifecycle skills for reviewed SDD planning, controlled execution, implementation audit, and final proof.

interface.shortDescription: Reviewed SDD planning, execution, audit, and proof.
interface.longDescription: Run a provider-neutral software-agent lifecycle from clarification through SDD specification, plan freeze, task packets, controlled implementation, independent implementation review, and final audit.
defaultPrompt: Create and review an SDD plan before implementation.
Audit the implementation against the frozen plan.
